title: Tirana 19 in 1 Vegetable Chopper Box Onion Chopper Salad Chopper Food Dicer Mandoline Vegetable Slicer Mandolin Slicer Onion Cutter
features: 14 in 1 Multifunction This product contains 8 freely interchangeable blades for large or small dice, thick or thin slices, shredded or julienne. An egg separator to easily separate egg whites from yolks

Creative Design Innovative design in slicer and vegetable slicer with unique non slip handle design. The bottom of the food slicer is equipped with non slip silicone feet, which can increase stability.

Easy Cleaning Function No more hassle of washing and wiping. Disassemble and simply put in the dishwasher. Cleans this salad cutter in minutes with the complimentary cleaning brush. Its compact size allows you to store it almost anywhere.

Size and Quality 33.5 x 12.5 x 10 cm Gray . 14 in 1 Vegetable Slicer is BPA free, non toxic and odorless. Made of stainless steel, all Speusazz Versatile Vegetable Slicer blades are ultra sharp so you won't have any problems slicing vegetables.
description: Product Description Description of multifunctional vegetable cutter Do you want a vegetable chopper manual tool that can solve your various chopping problems quickly, and easy to clean and store? Chopper Food choppers and dicers: Chop, Dice, Slice or Grate with our newest veggie chopper and potato chipper. This food slicer and grater will alleviate your prep time to just a couple of minutes. multi chopper manual made of anti-rust stainless steel. Save your teary eyes while using this onion dicer to chop onions. The vegetable dicer is suitable for 10+ vegetables and foods Grater Grating carrots, cucumbers or other vegetables will be safer than ever before with our grater blades. Equipped with a safety holder/hand protector, you can grate vegetables safely, quickly and beautifully. The vegetables you grate will simply fall into the container, making food prep a more appealing task. Slicer Do you have trouble with slicing cucumbers or onions to exact measurements? No worries. Don’t have to be an experienced cook. The slicer blades enable you to produce uniformly sliced vegetables. With the beautifully sliced vegetables, the food you cook will have a better look. Please rememer to use the hand protector when using the slicer blades Easy to use Busy lifestyles make us fall into the fast-food trap. It can take a lot of time and effort to dice, chop and slice the ingredients of a desired dish. Do not despair. Our kitchen gadgets tool makes this process less time-consuming making it easier to add vegetables to your meals. Innovative Design Free-up countertop space with the Food Container. Use the Food Holder while cutting small vegetables and fruits. This prevents food from slipping while slicing it. It also makes it clean, safe, and easy to work with. No more hassles of washing and wiping. Dismantle it and just put it in dishwasher. Vegetables chopper can solve your chopping problems. It’s the best in kitchen tools & gadgets Easy to clean It is easy to disassemble for the vegetable chopper,convenient to clean,just just use the claw and brush to scrape and sweep off residue on the press plate and the blades Package Includes 2 x mandoline Slicer + wavy shape 2 x Dicer blades (big and small) 2 x shredding blade (big and small) 1 x Egg separator 1 x Pressure 1 x Grating blade 1 x Non-slip handle 1 x Handguard 1× Food Draining Basket 1 x cleaning brush 1 x Base container
